name: Crisp Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir the sifted ingredients into the creamed mixture gradually.
5. Fold in the oats, 1/2 cup at a time, ensuring each addition is well combined.
6. Add the nuts after all of the oatmeal has been incorporated.
7. Divide the dough into two equal portions. Roll each portion into a log with a diameter of about 2 inches.
8. Chill the logs in the refrigerator for several hours.
9. Slice the chilled logs into disks, approximately 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick.
10. Place the disks on a greased baking sheet, leaving space between them.
11. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until lightly browned, about 10-15 minutes.
12. Remove from the sheet and allow to cool.
